Title: Checkout - Delivery Option Selection
Preconditions: Products in cart
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] Verify shipping options section visible
[ACT] select 'Delivery' option
[WAIT] Wait for address form to render
[ASSERT] Verify shipping address form appears
[ASSERT] Verify shipping method list visible
Assertions:
[DOM] Delivery radio/button is selected state
[DOM] Shipping address form fields rendered (Street City State ZIP Country)
[DOM] At least one shipping method option listed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /storefronts/shipping-methods returns non-empty array
[CONSOLE] No errors on delivery option selection
Failure_Signals: Delivery option not selectable; address form does not appear after selection

Title: Checkout - Enter Shipping Address
Preconditions: Delivery selected at checkout, user has no saved addresses
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart and proceed to checkout
[ACT] select 'Delivery' option
[ACT] Fill 'Street' field with valid street address
[ACT] Fill 'City' field with valid city
[ACT] Fill 'State' field with valid state
[ACT] Fill 'ZIP' field with valid postal code
[ACT] Fill 'Country' field with valid country
[ACT] click 'Continue' or 'Save Address'
[ASSERT] Verify address saved and displayed in summary
Assertions:
[DOM] All address fields accept text input
[STATE] Validation passes on all fields (no error states)
[STATE] Address displayed in shipping summary section
[DOM] Continue/Next step button becomes active
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST address payload contains all required fields
[CONSOLE] No validation errors in console
Failure_Signals: Form accepts invalid data without error; address not persisted after clicking Continue

Title: Checkout - Select Saved Address
Preconditions: User logged in with at least one saved address, products in cart
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart and proceed to checkout
[ACT] select 'Delivery' option
[WAIT] Wait for saved addresses to load
[ASSERT] Verify saved address dropdown or list appears
[ACT] select existing saved address from dropdown/list
[ASSERT] Verify address fields populated with saved address data
[ACT] Optionally edit a field and verify change persists
Assertions:
[DOM] Saved address dropdown or address list rendered
[STATE] Selecting address populates all form fields correctly
[DOM] Edit capability present (Edit button or inline edit)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/addresses returns saved addresses
[CONSOLE] No errors when loading saved addresses
Failure_Signals: Saved addresses not listed; selecting address does not populate fields

Title: Checkout - Address Validation
Preconditions: User at checkout shipping address step, address form open
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart and proceed to checkout shipping step
[ACT] Leave all required address fields empty
[ACT] click 'Continue'
[ASSERT] Verify inline validation errors appear per field
[ACT] Enter invalid ZIP format (e.g. ABC for US address)
[ASSERT] Verify ZIP format error message
[ACT] Fix all fields with valid data
[ACT] click 'Continue'
[ASSERT] Verify form advances to next step
Assertions:
[DOM] Inline error message per required empty field
[DOM] ZIP format error shown (invalid format for country)
[STATE] Form does not advance with validation errors
[STATE] Error messages clear when valid data entered
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No unhandled JS exceptions during validation
[API] No API calls made when client-side validation fails
Failure_Signals: Form advances with empty required fields; no field-level error messages shown

Title: Checkout - Shipping Method Selection
Preconditions: Valid shipping address entered at checkout, user at shipping method step
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to checkout shipping method step with valid address
[ASSERT] Verify shipping method list rendered
[ACT] select 'Ground' shipping option
[ASSERT] Verify Ground shipping cost displayed
[ASSERT] Verify order total updates to include shipping cost
[ACT] select 'Air' or express shipping option
[ASSERT] Verify cost updates to higher amount
[ASSERT] Verify delivery estimate displayed for each method
Assertions:
[DOM] Shipping methods listed with name and cost
[MATH] Order total = subtotal + selected shipping cost
[DOM] Delivery estimate text shown per method
[STATE] Switching method updates displayed total
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /shipping-rates or equivalent returns multiple methods
[CONSOLE] No errors on method switch
Failure_Signals: Only one shipping method shown; total does not update when method changes

Title: Checkout - Payment Method Selection
Preconditions: Shipping address and shipping method configured, user at payment step
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to checkout payment step
[ASSERT] Verify payment methods section rendered
[ACT] select 'Credit Card' payment option
[WAIT] Wait for payment form to render
[ASSERT] Verify credit card fields visible (card number, expiry, CVV)
[ASSERT] Verify required field indicators present
Assertions:
[DOM] Payment method list rendered with at least one option
[DOM] Credit card form fields rendered on selection
[DOM] Required field indicators visible on payment form
[STATE] Payment method selection active state reflected
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /payment-methods returns available processors
[CONSOLE] No errors loading payment iframe or form
Failure_Signals: No payment methods listed; payment form does not render after selection

Title: Checkout - Order Review
Preconditions: All checkout steps completed (address, shipping, payment), user at review step
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to checkout order review step
[ASSERT] Verify line items listed with name, quantity, price
[ASSERT] Verify shipping address shown
[ASSERT] Verify selected shipping method and cost shown
[ASSERT] Verify payment method shown (masked card or method name)
[ASSERT] Verify order totals: subtotal, shipping, tax, grand total
[ASSERT] Verify 'Place Order' button is active/enabled
[ACT] Verify each section has an Edit link or back navigation
Assertions:
[DOM] All cart line items displayed on review page
[DOM] Shipping address and method section rendered
[DOM] Payment method section rendered (no full card numbers)
[MATH] Grand total = subtotal + shipping + tax - discounts
[DOM] 'Place Order' button enabled
[DOM] Edit link or section navigation available
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No errors rendering review page
[NETWORK] No failed requests loading review page data
Failure_Signals: 'Place Order' button disabled without clear reason; line items missing from review

Title: Checkout - Place Order
Preconditions: All checkout info valid and reviewed, user at order review step
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to checkout review step with all steps complete
[ASSERT] Verify 'Place Order' button active
[ACT] click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] Wait for order processing indicator
[ASSERT] Verify loading/processing indicator shown
[KEY] Do NOT click again (double-click prevention)
[WAIT] Wait for confirmation page to load
[ASSERT] Verify order confirmation page displayed with order number
Assertions:
[STATE] Processing indicator shown immediately on click
[NAV] Redirected to order confirmation page
[DOM] Order number displayed on confirmation page
[STATE] Cart emptied after successful order placement
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] No unhandled exceptions on order submission
[NETWORK] POST /cart/createOrder or GraphQL mutation returns 200
[ADMIN] Order appears in {{ADMIN_URL}}/orders with correct status
Failure_Signals: Confirmation page never loads; order number not displayed; cart not cleared after submission
Cleanup: Cancel order via {{ADMIN_URL}}/orders if order was placed

Title: Checkout - Order Confirmation Page
Preconditions: Order just placed successfully, user on confirmation page
Steps:
[ASSERT] Verify order number displayed on confirmation page
[ASSERT] Verify all ordered line items listed on confirmation
[ASSERT] Verify shipping address shown on confirmation
[ASSERT] Verify shipping method shown
[ASSERT] Verify order totals shown (subtotal, shipping, tax, total)
[ASSERT] Verify confirmation email message or notification shown
[ASSERT] Verify order status shown as 'New'
Assertions:
[DOM] Order number visible and non-empty
[DOM] All line items from cart listed
[DOM] Shipping address matches what was entered
[MATH] Totals consistent with cart totals
[DOM] Email confirmation reference visible (e.g. 'A confirmation has been sent to your email')
[STATE] Order status = New
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns order with New status
[CONSOLE] No errors on confirmation page
Failure_Signals: Order number missing; line items not displayed on confirmation; status not shown

Title: Order History - View Orders
Preconditions: User has at least one previous order, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] Wait for orders list to load
[ASSERT] Verify orders list rendered
[ASSERT] Verify orders sorted with most recent first
[ASSERT] Verify each order row shows: order number, date, status, total
[ASSERT] Verify at least one order visible
Assertions:
[DOM] Orders list rendered with at least one row
[DOM] Order number, date, status, total shown per row
[STATE] Orders sorted descending by date (most recent first)
[DOM] Link to order detail available per row
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders returns list with correct fields
[CONSOLE] No errors loading order history
Failure_Signals: Orders list empty when orders exist; orders not sorted correctly

Title: Order History - View Details
Preconditions: At least one order exists in user's history, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on an existing order to view detail
[WAIT] Wait for order detail page to load
[ASSERT] Verify line items displayed (name, qty, price)
[ASSERT] Verify shipping address section shown
[ASSERT] Verify payment info shown (masked)
[ASSERT] Verify order status shown
[ASSERT] Verify order total breakdown visible
Assertions:
[DOM] Line items with name, quantity, unit price rendered
[DOM] Shipping address section rendered
[DOM] Payment method shown (no full card numbers)
[DOM] Status label visible
[DOM] Subtotal, shipping, tax, grand total shown
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns full order detail
[CONSOLE] No 404 or 500 errors on detail page
Failure_Signals: Order detail page shows no line items; clicking order link results in error page

Title: Order - Pickup Details Display
Preconditions: User has a BOPIS/pickup order in order history, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on a pickup/BOPIS order to view detail
[ASSERT] Verify pickup location name and address shown
[ASSERT] Verify store hours shown if available
[ASSERT] Verify pickup instructions or ready-for-pickup notification shown
[ASSERT] Verify no shipping address shown (pickup order)
Assertions:
[DOM] Pickup location name and address rendered
[DOM] Store hours section present
[DOM] Pickup instructions text visible
[STATE] No delivery shipping address section shown for pickup order
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns fulfillmentType = pickup
[CONSOLE] No rendering errors for pickup order type
Failure_Signals: Pickup location details missing; delivery address shown instead of pickup info

Title: Order - Delivery Details Display
Preconditions: User has a delivery order in order history, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on a delivery order to view detail
[ASSERT] Verify shipping address section rendered
[ASSERT] Verify carrier name shown if available
[ASSERT] Verify tracking number shown if order has been shipped
[ASSERT] Verify tracking link clickable for shipped orders
Assertions:
[DOM] Shipping address rendered correctly
[DOM] Carrier name shown if shipment created
[DOM] Tracking number visible for Shipped status orders
[DOM] Tracking link opens carrier website (new tab)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns shipmentDetails with carrier and tracking
[CONSOLE] No errors rendering tracking info
Failure_Signals: Shipping address not shown; tracking link broken or absent for shipped order

Title: Guest Checkout - Happy Path
Preconditions: Store allows anonymous users (anonymousUsersAllowed: true), products available in catalog
Steps:
[NAV] Open {{FRONT_URL}} in incognito/private window (not logged in)
[NAV] Navigate to product page for {{TEST_SKU}}
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Checkout' or 'Proceed to Checkout'
[WAIT] Wait for guest checkout email step
[ACT] Fill 'Email' field with guest email address
[ACT] Fill shipping address (First Name, Last Name, Street, City, State, ZIP, Country)
[ACT] select shipping method
[ACT] Fill payment details in payment form
[ACT] click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] Wait for confirmation page
[ASSERT] Verify confirmation page with order number displayed
Assertions:
[NAV] Guest reaches checkout without being redirected to login
[DOM] Email field appears on guest checkout
[DOM] Shipping form accepts all fields
[DOM] Shipping methods listed
[DOM] Payment form functional
[DOM] Confirmation page shows order number
[STATE] Cart cleared after order placement
[STATE] No account creation required to complete purchase
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] No errors during guest checkout flow
[NETWORK] No unauthorized 401 responses blocking checkout
[ADMIN] Guest order appears in {{ADMIN_URL}}/orders
Failure_Signals: Guest redirected to login page instead of proceeding as guest; confirmation page not reached after payment

Title: Guest Checkout - New Address Entry
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout (anonymousUsersAllowed: true), no saved addresses for guest
Steps:
[NAV] Proceed to checkout as guest (not logged in)
[ASSERT] Verify no pre-populated or saved address shown
[ACT] Fill 'Street' field with valid street address
[ACT] Fill 'City', 'State', 'ZIP', 'Country' with valid values
[ACT] click 'Continue'
[WAIT] Wait for shipping method step
[ASSERT] Verify entered address shown in shipping summary
[ASSERT] Verify shipping methods calculate based on entered address
Assertions:
[DOM] No saved address shown for guest user
[DOM] All address fields accept manual input
[STATE] Validation passes on valid address
[STATE] Address carried through to shipping method and order summary steps
[DOM] Shipping methods listed after address entry
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST address for guest session returns valid response
[CONSOLE] No errors on address submission
Failure_Signals: Saved addresses from previous sessions shown for anonymous user; shipping methods not loading after address entry

Title: Guest Checkout - Track Order
Preconditions: Guest order successfully placed, order number and guest email noted
Steps:
[NAV] Note order number from confirmation page
[NAV] Note email used during guest checkout
[NAV] Navigate to order tracking page (e.g. {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders or dedicated tracking URL)
[ACT] Fill guest email field with order email
[ACT] Fill order number field with order number
[ACT] click 'Track Order' or 'Submit'
[WAIT] Wait for tracking results
[ASSERT] Verify correct order details displayed
[ASSERT] Verify status clearly shown
[ACT] Enter incorrect email with correct order number
[ASSERT] Verify error shown for mismatch
Assertions:
[DOM] Tracking form accessible without login
[DOM] Email and order number fields present
[STATE] Correct combination returns order details and status
[STATE] Incorrect email + order number returns error (not order data)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /orders/track?email=...&order=... returns correct order
[CONSOLE] No unhandled errors on tracking page
Failure_Signals: Tracking page requires login; correct guest credentials return no order; wrong credentials return order data (security issue)

Title: Guest Checkout - Prompt Registration After Purchase
Preconditions: Guest order just placed, user on confirmation page
Steps:
[NAV] Complete guest checkout and land on order confirmation page
[ASSERT] Verify 'Create Account' prompt or banner present
[ASSERT] Verify prompt references linking order to new account
[ACT] click 'Create Account' from confirmation page
[WAIT] Wait for registration form
[ASSERT] Verify registration form pre-fills guest email
[ACT] Complete registration with valid password
[ACT] submit registration
[WAIT] Wait for account creation confirmation
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ASSERT] Verify guest order appears in new account order history
Assertions:
[DOM] Create Account prompt visible on confirmation page
[DOM] Prompt text references order linking
[DOM] Registration form pre-fills guest email
[STATE] After registration guest order appears in account history
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /account/register links guest order to new account
[CONSOLE] No errors during account creation flow
Failure_Signals: Create Account prompt absent from confirmation; guest order missing from account after registration

Title: Guest Checkout - With Coupon Code
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout (anonymousUsersAllowed: true), valid coupon code exists in system
Steps:
[NAV] Proceed to checkout as guest with items in cart
[ACT] Enter guest email address
[ACT] Fill shipping address
[ACT] select shipping method
[ASSERT] Locate coupon code input field
[ACT] Enter valid coupon code in coupon field
[ACT] click 'Apply'
[WAIT] Wait for discount to apply
[ASSERT] Verify discount line item appears in order summary
[ASSERT] Verify total reflects discounted amount
[ACT] click 'Place Order'
[ASSERT] Verify confirmation page shows discounted total
Assertions:
[DOM] Coupon input field accessible to guest users
[STATE] Valid coupon accepted with success confirmation
[DOM] Discount shown as separate line in order summary
[MATH] Total = subtotal + shipping + tax - coupon discount
[DOM] Confirmation page shows coupon discount line item
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation response errors[] is empty
[API] Order payload contains applied coupon/promotion
[CONSOLE] No errors on coupon application
Failure_Signals: Coupon field not shown for guests; coupon accepted but discount not reflected in total; discount disappears at confirmation

Title: Guest Checkout - Field Validation
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout email and address entry step
Steps:
[NAV] Proceed to checkout as guest (not logged in)
[ACT] click 'Continue' without entering email
[ASSERT] Verify 'Email is required' or equivalent error shown
[ACT] Enter invalid email format 'notanemail'
[ASSERT] Verify 'Enter a valid email address' error shown
[ACT] Enter valid email address
[ACT] Leave required address fields (Street, City, ZIP) empty
[ACT] click 'Continue'
[ASSERT] Verify inline error per empty required field
[ACT] Fix each field with valid data
[ASSERT] Verify error clears as each field is corrected
[ACT] click 'Continue' with all valid data
[ASSERT] Verify form advances to next step
Assertions:
[DOM] Email required error on empty submit
[DOM] Email format error on invalid format
[DOM] Per-field inline errors for required address fields
[STATE] Form does not advance with validation errors
[STATE] Individual errors clear when field corrected
[NAV] Form advances after all errors resolved
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS exceptions during validation interactions
[API] No API calls made while client-side validation active
Failure_Signals: Form advances with invalid email; no per-field errors shown; all errors clear simultaneously instead of per field

Title: Guest Checkout - Register After Purchase and Order Linked
Preconditions: Guest order placed, on confirmation page with Create Account option
Steps:
[NAV] Complete guest checkout successfully
[ASSERT] Verify 'Create Account' prompt on confirmation page
[ACT] click 'Create Account' or 'Register' from confirmation
[ACT] Complete registration form with guest email and new password
[ACT] submit registration form
[WAIT] Wait for account confirmation
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ASSERT] Verify guest order visible in order history
[ASSERT] Verify order details match original guest order
Assertions:
[DOM] Create Account prompt on confirmation
[STATE] Registration completes without error
[STATE] Guest order linked to new account and visible in order history
[DOM] Order details (items, totals, addresses) match original guest order
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /account/register response indicates order linking
[CONSOLE] No errors during registration and order linking
[ADMIN] Account created in {{ADMIN_URL}} with order linked
Failure_Signals: Guest order absent from account history after registration; registration fails when using guest email
Cleanup: Delete test account via {{ADMIN_URL}} if created

Title: Guest Checkout - Disabled When Anonymous Users Not Allowed
Preconditions: Store configured with anonymousUsersAllowed: false, products available
Steps:
[NAV] Open {{FRONT_URL}} in incognito/private window (not logged in)
[NAV] Navigate to product page for {{TEST_SKU}}
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Checkout' or 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] Verify user redirected to sign-in or login page
[ASSERT] Verify prompt to log in or register
[ASSERT] Verify cart contents preserved after redirect
Assertions:
[NAV] Guest redirected to login/register page (not checkout)
[DOM] Login or register prompt displayed
[STATE] Cart contents preserved for authenticated session
[STATE] No guest checkout option shown when disabled
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Store settings endpoint reflects anonymousUsersAllowed=false
[CONSOLE] No unexpected errors on redirect
Failure_Signals: Guest can access checkout without login when anonymousUsersAllowed=false; cart lost on redirect to login

Title: Order Status - New
Preconditions: User logged in, order just placed through storefront
Steps:

[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders

[ASSERT] Verify status label matches configured display text

[STATE] Status visible immediately after order placement without page reload

Title: Order Status - Processing
Preconditions: Order in New status, admin access available
Test_Data: url={{FRONT_URL}}, admin={{ADMIN_URL}}, admin_user={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}, admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}, user={{USER_EMAIL}}, password={{USER_PASSWORD}}
Steps:

[DOM] Status = 'Processing' on order detail page

[DOM] Order history/timeline shows New → Processing transition if timeline visible
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns status = Processing after admin update
[ADMIN] Admin order management page confirms status change saved
[CONSOLE] No errors on status refresh
Failure_Signals: Storefront status not updated after admin change; timeline shows incorrect transition order

Title: B2B Checkout - Approval Workflow
Preconditions: B2B org with approval workflow enabled, Buyer and Admin/Approver roles configured
Test_Data: url={{FRONT_URL}}, org_user={{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}, org_pass={{ORG_USER_PASSWORD}}, admin={{ADMIN_URL}}, admin_user={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}, admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}

Failure_Signals: Order placed directly as Processing bypassing approval; approval queue not showing order for admin
